subject: [PATCH v7 10/10] selftests/dax: add dax/kmem hotplug sysfs regression test

2026-07-12.patch_summary: This patch adds a selftest to verify the functionality of dax/kmem hotplug sysfs attributes. The test transitions a kmem-backed dax device between 'unplugged', 'online' and 'online_movable' states, ensuring that memory is correctly added or removed from the system. It also checks for idempotence, invalid input rejection, and correct behavior when toggling blocks out-of-band through the per-block memory interface. A specific regression test case is included to ensure re-onlineing properly reserves resources after an unplug operation.
